description_long: This is a protective gas mask helmet featuring a smooth, matte beige shell with a large, single-piece transparent visor for eye protection. The helmet has a prominent circular filter canister attached to the lower left side, designed for air purification, and a central exhalation valve below the visor. The rear of the helmet is open, with two wide brown adjustable straps for securing the mask to the head. The mask's edges are contoured to fit closely around the face, and the interior appears to be lined for comfort and sealing. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and safety in hazardous urban environments.
description: A beige gas mask helmet with a large visor, side filter canister, and brown adjustable straps. The design is functional and protective, suitable for hazardous urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full-face visor, central exhalation valve, and the attached filter canister on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding filter canister and the smooth, contoured shell with visible strap attachment points.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open back with two wide brown straps and the interior lining, showing the helmet's fastening system.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the helmet's profile, the absence of a filter on this side, and the continuation of the brown straps.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Single large circular filter canister on the lower left side and a central exhalation valve below the visor; no additional vents visible.
